response.original_title: Become a Pro Arm Wrestler: Andy Emilio
response.overview: Professional arm wrestler Andy Emilio flexes his muscles and schools rookies in the art of crushing egos, conquering cramps, and winning - one sweaty handshake at a time.
response.tagline: Meet the World Armwrestling League Champion
response.title: Become a Pro Arm Wrestler: Andy Emilio
